title: BR-Football-Dataset rows tagged with raw 'tournament' strings won't match canonical competition filters
evidence: internal/soccer/match.go:216 sets Competition: row[col["tournament"]] verbatim; find_matches/standings filter competition by exact string match (store.go:47), so these rows are unreachable via the spec's 'Brasileirao'/'Copa do Brasil'/'Libertadores' filter values
suggestion: Normalize the tournament column onto the canonical competition names, or document the extra competition labels

title: LoadStoreFromDir hard-fails if any single dataset file is missing
evidence: internal/soccer/load.go:26 returns err immediately when loadFile fails; a single absent CSV aborts the entire server startup rather than degrading
suggestion: Warn-and-continue on a missing optional dataset so the server can still serve the datasets that are present

title: Team alias table covers only two clubs
evidence: internal/soccer/normalize.go:29 teamAliases maps only atletico mineiro/paranaense; other cross-dataset name variants rely solely on accent+state-suffix stripping
suggestion: Extend aliases as cross-dataset name mismatches are discovered; current coverage is adequate for the sampled queries

title: Maintainability score is moderate (0.75)
evidence: scores.json maintainability=0.7548; store.go concentrates six query methods (347 lines) in one file
suggestion: Optional: split store.go query methods by concern (matches/teams/standings/stats)
